    • getDevice

      public String getDevice()
      Device where the tensor is located. Cannot be empty.
For multi-device functions, it's the default device passed to placer.
      string device = 3;
      Specified by:
      getDevice in interface RemoteTensorHandleOrBuilder
      Returns:
      The device.
